title: Encrucijada para una monja
writer: José Frade, Federico De Urrutia, Manuel Sebares
actors: Rosanna Schiaffino, John Richardson, Mara Cruz
plot: During an uprising in the Belgian Congo, a convent of nuns are besieged and the Reverend Mother is killed and Sister Maria is raped. Returning to Belgium, Sister Maria finds out to her horror that she is pregnant. Rejected by her ...
